calendar.matters:
Status Report For Plaintiff Sameer Qandah To Return Funds And Pay $500 In Monthly Installments On The 1st Day Of Each To Each Month To Satisfy Total Amount Of $8156.17 To Counsel Andrew Westley, Esq.
Off Calendar Sep-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Status Report for Plaintiff Sameer Qandah to return funds and pay $500 in monthly installments on the 1st day of each month to satisfy total amount of $8156.17 to counsel Andrew Westley, Esq.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.
Andrew Westley appearing on his own behalf, sworn and examined.
No appearance by Sameer Qandah.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, Court signed Judgment (Sanctions Against Sameer Qandah).

Notice Of Motion For An Order Allowing Successor Guardian Ad Litem, Ruby Rowe, To Open A Blocked Account On Behalf Of The Minor Plaintiff
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Off Calendar

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Continued To Feb-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jan-31-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For An Order Allowing Successor Guardian Ad Litem, Ruby Rowe, To Open A Blocked Account On Behalf Of The Minor Plaintiff
Off Calendar Dec-29-2016 Continued To Apr-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Uncontested Calendar. Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Andrew Westley, Esq., appearing for and with Petitioner: SAMEER QANDAH, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: SHILOHMAE QANDAH present in court.
Successor Guardian Ad Litem Ruby Rowe present in court.
Petitioner and Successor sworn and examined.

Order to Show Cause for Sanctions of $10,000.00 for violation of Court Order against Plaintiff Sameer Qandah is heard this day.
Response to OSC on file.

After Evidence and Argument of respective parties, the Court Ordered Successor Guardian Ad Litem Ruby Rowe to open a blocked account with counsel using counsel's personal funds within 2 weeks, otherwise sanctions and contempt proceedings commence against Successor Guardian Ad Litem Ruby Rowe.

Compliance hearing for status of filing of Receipt and Acknowledgment of Order for the Deposit of Money into blocked account of February 9, 2017 is advanced to February 7, 2017.
Plaintiff SAMEER QANDAH to return funds to Counsel Andrew Westley, Esq., by April 6, 2017.
Order to Show Cause continued to April 6, 2017 at 9:00am in Dept 514.
Plaintiff SAMEER QANDAH ordered to appear.

Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For An Order Allowing Successor Guardian Ad Litem, Ruby Rowe, To Open A Blocked Account On Behalf Of The Minor Plaintiff
Off Calendar Nov-10-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Motion for Successor to Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Denise Doucette, CSR#5963.

Andrew Westley, Esq., appearing for and with Petitioner Ruby Rowe, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor Shilohmae Qandah present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $15,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $5,000 payable to Law Firm of Andrew E. Westley
Costs: $1843.83
